name: AppMagic
description: AppMagic — mobile app market intelligence platform built for mobile game publishers and investors, offering quick market research, Success Meter for hit segments, and Live-Ops analysis for retention and monetization.

seo.title: AppMagic — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: AppMagic: AppMagic — mobile app market intelligence platform built for mobile game publishers and investors, offering quick market research, Success Meter for h

when_to_use: Researching top-grossing mobile game segments before greenlight
Analyzing Live Ops features driving retention in competitor games
Estimating download volume for pitch decks and investor due diligence
Identifying monetization patterns in hit segments using Success Meter

pros: Built for mobile game publishers and investors
Success Meter highlights hit segments fast
Live-Ops analysis covers retention and monetization
cons: Games-only focus, weak for non-game apps
Pricing tailored to pros, not hobbyists
Data can lag on smaller markets
review.verdict: Top-tier market intelligence for mobile game teams, but non-gaming publishers should look elsewhere.
review.best_for: Game publishers and investors researching genres and Live-Ops
